page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, utilizing Intel Xeon processors operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It does not feature any GPU accelerators. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

The high memory density relative to the dedicated CPU core count makes this instance profile qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require local storage IOPS or GPU acceleration. It is designed for applications such as in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data processing tasks where RAM capacity is the primary resource constraint.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz, with one thread per core. The instance features 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that require substantial RAM capacity without the need for local disk performance or graphics acceleration. Appropriate workloads include in-memory databases, caching layers, and large-scale data processing.

tagline: A memory-optimized server configuration featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory with a 1:8 core-to-RAM ratio
